repo_prior_art.cite: pid_did_anticipation_bounded_v1: sharp support interval for bounded latent DID distortions; CausalSmith/doc/API.md §3 PartialID catalogue otherwise empty

published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023ParallelTrends plus BalkePearl1997Bounds/Demuynck2015LPBounds: bounded-trend partial ID and finite LP sharp bounds, but not FDID causal moderation
none for the specific FDID pooled sign-loss frontier
XuZhaoDing2026FDID: exact factorial parallel trends identifies causal moderation

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: Exhibit 9.1 computes only the reduced support h on S(P;rho), not the advertised full Gamma(P;rho) sharp projection/lift.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 3
novelty_flags.one_line: The zero-budget point-identification corner is exactly the XuZhaoDing2026FDID comparator, so it should be a sanity corollary rather than a novelty-bearing main theorem.

soundness_flags.label: Setup / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The locked observable distribution defines mu_gz as E[Delta Y(0)|G=g,Z=z], a counterfactual untreated trend mean, while calling it observed; the observed FDID cell contrast and residual treatment-effect terms are missing.

soundness_flags.label: Setup / Theorem 3
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 4 says tau_em(P) is the observed effect-modification contrast, but Section 6 defines it from untreated-trend means, so the claimed reduction to XuZhaoDing2026FDID is not stated in the same object.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: With Gamma(P;rho) defined only by nu_gz(z)=mu_gz and the same three linear inequalities on s(nu), every feasible s lifts to nu by construction; the sharpness projection is currently a definition unfold plus routine LP duality.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The pooled frontier h(c;rho)=min{rho_*,rho_0+rho_1} is a two-variable support calculation from the three displayed budget inequalities, not yet a flagship-grade nontrivial theorem.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the mu_gz definition with observable FDID cell outcome-change contrasts and add the missing residual decomposition showing exactly how untreated-trend imbalance enters theta_cm.

Make Gamma(P;rho) a genuine full potential-outcome completion problem with observable constraints, then add a worked nu-table exhibit proving the reduced four-coordinate interval is not assumed by construction.
Demote Theorem 3 to a sanity corollary and make the flagship statement a strict extension of XuZhaoDing2026FDID with a location-level open-gap anchor.

recommended_next_step: Revise the setup so the observed FDID estimand and latent untreated-trend residuals are separate objects, then re-prove sharpness as a non-definitional projection result.
